RUBEN HUTSON SR VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Moiton To Tax Or Strike Costs By Pltf, Ruben Hutson, Sr.
rulings.Rulings: DENY STRIKING COST. MOTION TO TAX COSTS DENIED except as to plaintiff's concession that expert witness fees should be dropped from the request for costs. Therefore the amount of costs requested is now $474. Defendant's motion to tax those costs is DENIED. (302/REQ/he)
